title: Fix internal error on modport selection of virtual interface handle

features.name: modport selection from virtual interface handle
features.description: Code should include modport selection on a virtual interface handle where a class field is assigned from a modport-qualified virtual interface member

features.name: modport-qualified virtual interface type in class member
features.description: Code should include a class member declared with a modport-qualified virtual interface type using dot notation

features.name: interface with clocking block referenced by modport
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a clocking block and a modport that references the clocking block
